results.rendered_html:
vi-√kas (also incorrectly written vi-kaś) cl. 1. P. -kasati, to burst, become split or divided or rent asunder,  Suśr.  (cf. vi-kasta);
to open, expand, blossom, bloom,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c. (cf. vikasita);
to shine, be bright, beam (with joy &c.),  Kāv. ;  VarBṛS. ;
to spread out, extend, increase,  MBh. ;  Kāv. ;  Suśr.  :
Caus. -kāsayati, to cause to open or blow or expand or shine,  Kāv. ;  Kathās.

results.rendered_html:
vikas 1 P.
1 To open, expand (fig. also); vikasati hi pataṃgasyodaye puṃḍarīkaṃ  Māl. 1. 28 ;  Śi. 9. 47 , 82 ;  Ku. 7. 55 ; nijahṛdi vikasaṃtaḥ  Bh. 2. 78. 
2 To burst, become divided.
— Caus. To open, cause to expand; caṃdro vikāsayati kairavacakravālaṃ  Bh. 2. 73 ;  Śi. 15. 12 ;  Amaru. 84.
